summary: The diff implements most of the three requirements. REQ-1 (edit profile) and REQ-3 (delete account) appear fully implemented. REQ-2 (delete content) has frontend support in ContentCard and ContentDetailPage per the file summaries, and backend principal checks are present. However, one specific AC for REQ-2 — removal from the playback queue after deletion — requires scrutiny: the backend deleteUserProfile removes the user's queue but there is no evidence that deleteContent removes the content from other users' playback queues.

missing_requirements.requirement: The deleted content must also be removed from the playback queue if present after deletion.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show the backend deleteContent implementation removing the content from playback queues, nor does the visible portion of useDeleteContent in useQueries.ts show queue invalidation. This AC cannot be verified from the available diff.
